notes: All 5 required workers launched and completed. The Copilot CLI task tool did not return a background agent id; telemetry launch_started events used agent-id=child_id placeholders.
Top risk is metaswarm orphan recovery using task_id to locate commander heartbeat, causing false commander inactivity and erroneous requeue.

top_findings.finding: Metaswarm orphan recovery heartbeat path mismatch: checks $BASE/commanders/<task_id>/swarm-state.json (task_id from claimed task) instead of commander_id progress_dir; can wrongly re-queue active commander tasks.
TOTAL_TASKS fallback may overcount if duplicates exist across queue/claimed/results because sort -u dedupes full paths not task ids; percent can be wrong.
Smoke test does not exercise monitor or live telemetry updates (dry-run + agent-cmd true), leaving Agent Pulse/live count regressions untested.
README describes PID-based requeue, but monitor relies on tmux pane census and claimed file ages; documentation mismatch.
